channel.title: BF Formal Language APIs on BF Website
channel.description: Recent content in BF Formal Language APIs on BF Website

item.title: BF Operations Flow API
BF Relations API
item.description: BF Relations API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //Exclusive Rights Only// The BF Relations APP/API generates datasets of Meaningful <cause, operation>→consequence BF Weakness Triples. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFFormalLanguage.xml/BFRelations https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFFormalLanguage.json/BFRelations API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("user", YOUR_USER_NAME); client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("key", YOUR_KEY); //result in XML var responseXML = await client.GetAsync("BFFormalLanguage.xml/BFRelations/api"); responseXML.

item.title: BF BFTransitions API
item.description: BF BFTransitions API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //Exclusive Rights Only// The BF BFTransitions APP/API generates datasets of Meaningful consequence↷cause BFTransitions between weaknesses of the same BF Class Type, but with different corresponding BF Consequence and BF Cause values. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFFormalLanguage.xml/BFBFTransitions https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFFormalLanguage.json/BFBFTransitions API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.

item.title: BF LL1 ACFG API
item.description: BF LL1 ACFG API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # The current BF Taxonomy comprises the BF Input/Output Check(_INP), Memory Corruption/Disclosure (_MEM), and Data Type (_DAT) Class Types and the BF Failure (_FLR) Class Type. //Exclusive Rights Only// The BF LL1 ACFG APP/API queries BF and generates the corresponding (i.e., filtered) BF LL1 ACFG in EBNF format. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFFormalLanguage API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.

item.title: BF Parser API
item.description: BF Parser API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # The BF Parser API performs Validation and Verification of BF Specifications in .bfv, .bfvul, and .bff formats. It is also incorporated in the BF Tool App, BF GUI Tool, and any upload BF APP/API. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFFormalLanguage/BFParser API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.
